derivation.source: SELECT MAX(C_BP_GROUP_ID) FROM C_BP_GROUP WHERE AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_ORG_ID@, AD_ORG_ID, @#AD_CLIENT_ID@) <> -1 AND ISDEFAULT = 'Y' AND AD_CLIENT_ID = @#AD_CLIENT_ID@
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_BPARTNER_DISCOUNT WHERE C_BPARTNER_ID=@C_BPARTNER_ID@
